data.content:
The file is generated successfully (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but the compiler doesn't see it. The problem: **globs expand at evaluation time** (before any target runs), so the generated file isn't included in the `Compile` item group.

The fix is to explicitly add the generated file to `Compile` and `FileWrites` inside the target:

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and register for Clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates the file but never adds it to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild globs expand at evaluation time (before targets run), so the generated file in `obj/` isn't picked up automatically.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, and also register it with `FileWrites` so it gets cleaned properly.

Let me use the `including-generated-files` skill since it's directly relevant.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and register for Clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds and runs correctly. Here's what was wrong and the fix:

**Root cause:** MSBuild globs (implicit `<Compile Include="**/*.cs">`) expand at **evaluation time**, before any targets execute. The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes the file during **execution time**, so the compiler never sees it.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target to explicitly include the generated file in `Compile` (so it's compiled) and `FileWrites` (so `dotnet clean` removes it):

```xml
<ItemGroup>
  <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
  <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
</ItemGroup>
```
